prompt.content:
Using the model, calculate the Enterprise Value for S&P Global under the following assumptions.

Assumptions:

1) Total US equity risk premium of 4.47% + 25 bps
2) Risk-free rate as the 5 year treasury rate (2026-01-05) 
3) Decrease the long term growth rate by 50 bps. Use the growth in perpetuity approach to calculate the Enterprise Value.
4) Round to two decimals and present data in $ millions.

rubrics.name: States S&P Global Enterprise Value is $126,324.36 million (acceptable range... (ver_1fb86dffb2cd4c8190861602f0cfe91a)

messages.content: States S&P Global Enterprise Value is $126,324.36 million (acceptable range $125,061.12 to $127,587.60).
